error_signature: OAuth callback failed because of insufficient permissions
title: Google Calendar OAuth callback insufficient permissions
symptom: When trying to authenticate Google Calendar in n8n, the error 'OAuth callback failed because of insufficient permissions' appears.
root_cause: The OAuth callback URL is set to localhost, which is often not accepted by Google for OAuth2 authentication. This can lead to insufficient permissions errors when trying to authenticate from a non-localhost environment.
fix_steps: Set the correct environment variable for the OAuth callback URL
Ensure the URL is accessible and not set to localhost
agent_instruction: Update the OAuth callback URL in the environment variables to a valid public URL.
